_publications._publicationTitle: Kinome Profiling of NF1-Related MPNSTs in Response to Kinase Inhibition and Doxorubicin Reveals Therapeutic Vulnerabilities.

_contextSnippet: To evaluate the kinome response to MEK inhibition in NF1-deficient MPNSTs with distinctive genomic backgrounds, we used the MEK inhibitor trametinib
details: Used as host for MPNST tumor models to evaluate kinase inhibitor responses
